---
layout: home

hero:
  name: Golog
  text: A Simple, Lightweight Blog
  image:
    src: /favicon.ico
    alt: Golog
  tagline: Written in Go, single-file deployment, start writing instantly
  actions:
    - theme: brand
      text: Getting Started
      link: /en/guide/getting-started
    - theme: alt
      text: Download
      link: /en/download
    - theme: alt
      text: GitHub
      link: https://github.com/giserlab/golog
    - theme: alt
      text: Live Demo
      link: https://golog-demo.giserlab.cn/admin

features:
  - icon:
      src: data:image/svg+xml;base64,
    title: Rich Content Support
    details: Supports Markdown, Mermaid diagrams, LaTeX math formulas, and table of contents generation — perfect for technical writing.
  - icon:
      src: data:image/svg+xml;base64,
    title: Multiple Post Types
    details: Supports blog posts, moments, and whispers — three post types to meet different recording scenarios.
  - icon:
      src: data:image/svg+xml;base64,
    title: Single-File Deployment
    details: All theme assets are embedded in the compiled binary — no extra dependencies, run with a single file.
  - icon:
      src: data:image/svg+xml;base64,
    title: Mobile-Friendly
    details: All themes are responsive, providing a great reading experience on phones, tablets, and desktops.
  - icon:
      src: data:image/svg+xml;base64,
    title: Themes & i18n
    details: Built-in multiple themes with multi-language localization — easily customize your blog style.
  - icon:
      src: data:image/svg+xml;base64,
    title: Secure & Reliable
    details: Built-in CSRF protection, cookie session management, and password reset to keep your blog safe.
---

  <figcaption>Login page</figcaption>

  <figcaption>Admin dashboard</figcaption>
</figure>

</div>
